# FHIR Query Set: Prostate Cancer Population Identification

> **Strategy**: Union all patients returned across all queries, deduplicating by patient reference/ID. The `_include=*:patient` parameter pulls Patient resources alongside clinical resources for direct identification. The `subject:Patient.gender=male` chained parameter anchors all queries to the male population.

---

## Group 1 — Prostate Cancer Diagnoses (Condition)

Captures active disease, carcinoma-in-situ, metastatic disease, and personal history (for survivorship/surveillance patients).

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D07.5&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Z85.46&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|93974005&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|314994000&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|396198002&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Condition:patient
```

| Code | System | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| C61 | ICD-10-CM | Malignant neoplasm of prostate |
| D07.5 | ICD-10-CM | Carcinoma in situ of prostate |
| Z85.46 | ICD-10-CM | Personal history of malignant neoplasm of prostate |
| 399068003 | SNOMED CT | Malignant tumor of prostate |
| 93974005 | SNOMED CT | Primary malignant neoplasm of prostate |
| 314994000 | SNOMED CT | Metastatic malignant neoplasm of prostate |
| 396198002 | SNOMED CT | Non-metastatic prostate cancer |

---

## Group 2 — ADT & Anti-Androgen Medications (MedicationRequest + MedicationAdministration)

### 2a. MedicationRequest (Prescriptions)
Casts wide net across active, completed, and stopped orders to capture full historical population.

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|203852&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=active,completed,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:patient

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|149922&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=active,completed,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:patient

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1307461&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=active,completed,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:patient

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1100073&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=active,completed,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:patient

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|700872&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=active,completed,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

### 2b. MedicationAdministration (Critical for Injectable ADT — Leuprolide & Degarelix depot injections are often administered in-clinic and recorded here rather than as prescriptions)

```
MedicationAdministration?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|203852&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=MedicationAdministration:patient

MedicationAdministration?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|700872&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=MedicationAdministration:patient
```

| RxNorm | Drug | Class | Route Note |
|---|---|---|---|
| 203852 | Leuprolide (Lupron) | GnRH agonist | IM/SQ injection — check MedAdmin |
| 149922 | Bicalutamide (Casodex) | Anti-androgen (1st gen) | Oral |
| 1307461 | Enzalutamide (Xtandi) | Anti-androgen (2nd gen) | Oral |
| 1100073 | Abiraterone (Zytiga) | CYP17 inhibitor | Oral |
| 700872 | Degarelix (Firmagon) | GnRH antagonist | SQ injection — check MedAdmin |

---

## Group 3 — Prostate Biopsy (Procedure)

Captures transrectal, transperineal, and generic biopsy procedures by both SNOMED and CPT coding.

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|44608003&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|176106009&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|173196005&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|420420005&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt|55700&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient

Procedure?code=http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt|55706&subject:Patient.gender=male&_include=Procedure:patient
```

| Code | System | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 44608003 | SNOMED CT | Biopsy of prostate (broad parent concept) |
| 176106009 | SNOMED CT | Transrectal biopsy of prostate |
| 173196005 | SNOMED CT | Transperineal biopsy of prostate |
| 420420005 | SNOMED CT | Core needle biopsy of prostate |
| 55700 | CPT | Biopsy, prostate; needle or punch, single or multiple |
| 55706 | CPT | Biopsies, prostate, needle, saturation sampling |

---

## Group 4 — Elevated PSA Observations (>4 ng/mL)

Queries both the standard and immunoassay-specific LOINC codes; restricts to finalized lab results.

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|2857-1&value-quantity=gt4|http://unitsofmeasure.org|ng/mL&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=final&_include=Observation:patient

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|10508-0&value-quantity=gt4|http://unitsofmeasure.org|ng/mL&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=final&_include=Observation:patient

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|19201-4&value-quantity=gt4|http://unitsofmeasure.org|ng/mL&subject:Patient.gender=male&status=final&_include=Observation:patient
```

| LOINC | Display | Note |
|---|---|---|
| 2857-1 | Prostate specific Ag [Mass/vol] in Serum or Plasma | Most common — use as primary |
| 10508-0 | Prostate specific Ag by Immunoassay | Immunoassay-specific (Quest/LabCorp) |
| 19201-4 | Prostate specific Ag panel | Panel-level code, less common |

---

## Post-Query Deduplication Logic

```
Patient Union = DISTINCT patient references from:
  ├── Group 1: Condition.subject refs
  ├── Group 2: MedicationRequest.subject + MedicationAdministration.subject refs
  ├── Group 3: Procedure.subject refs
  └── Group 4: Observation.subject refs
```

> ⚠️ **Clinical Notes for QI Team**:
> - **ADT Adherence**: Focus Group 2 on `status=active` only for current ADT users; use completed/stopped to identify gaps/discontinuations.
> - **PSA Surveillance**: Group 4 identifies patients with *ever* elevated PSA — for the QI measure, you'll also want Observation queries with `date` filters to assess recency of surveillance testing.
> - **Injection ADT**: Leuprolide and degarelix are typically 1-, 3-, or 6-month depot injections documented via MedicationAdministration in many EHRs — Group 2b is essential for these patients.
> - **Missing cases**: Patients on orchiectomy (surgical castration, CPT 54520/SNOMED 396705005) would not appear in medication queries — consider adding a Procedure query for surgical ADT.

1. **Union logic**: Take the union of `patient` references across all 4 query result sets. A patient appearing in **any** query is a candidate for inclusion. ## FHIR Query: Elevated PSA Observations

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|2857-1&value-quantity=gt4||ng/mL

### Query Breakdown

| Component | Value | Description |
|-----------|-------|-------------|
| **Resource** | `Observation` | Clinical observation/measurement |
| **`code`** | `http://loinc.org\|2857-1` | LOINC: *Prostate specific Ag [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma* |

---

### Value-Quantity Parameter Format
```
gt4||ng/mL
 │   │  └─ Unit code (UCUM)
 │   └──── System (empty = any system)
 └──────── Comparator + value (gt = greater than)
```

**With UCUM system explicitly specified:**
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|2857-1&value-quantity=gt4|http://unitsofmeasure.org|ng/mL
